title: Window Management
description: Learn to manage multiple windows — minimize, maximize, and switch between them.

steps.instruction: You have two windows open — File Explorer and Notepad. Click on the File Explorer window to bring it to the front.
steps.hint: Click anywhere on the File Explorer window that's partially visible behind Notepad.

steps.instruction: Open a third application — PowerShell. Use the Taskbar to launch it.
steps.hint: Click the PowerShell icon (💠) in the Taskbar at the bottom.

steps.instruction: Close the Notepad window using the X button or Ctrl+W.
steps.hint: Click the X in the top-right corner of the Notepad window, or press Ctrl+W.
